name: inventory_visibility
description: Focused inventory specialist for stock posture, inventory lookup, alerts, warehouse visibility, reservations, movements, tracking, and expiry monitoring.

skills.name: Inventory Visibility
skills.description: Search inventories, inspect stock posture, track movements, and review low-stock or expiry alerts.
examples: Inspect what is stored in Rack B.
Show recent stock movements for barcode B-123.
